## Compound

- **Name:**
- **Class:** (pharma / herb / supplement / biologic / other)
- **PubChem CID (if known):**
- **SMILES (if known):**

## Proposed category

- [ ] Rescue (acute mediator blockade)
- [ ] Maintenance (daily stabilization)
- [ ] Remission (upstream / root-cause)

## Mechanism (best understanding)

Brief — pathway / receptor / target. e.g. "MRGPRX2 antagonist", "Nrf2 activator".

## Evidence

- [ ] Clinical / human data (cite)
- [ ] In vitro on human mast cells (LAD2 / HMC-1 / primary)
- [ ] Animal model
- [ ] Anecdotal / case reports
- [ ] Mechanistic only

Citations or links:

## Notes

Any caveats, drug interactions, contraindications, special populations,
formulation specifics (bioavailability, etc.).
